creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer,

the master site of print/cups-pstoraster, *.easysw.com, has gone away,
and we're left with the funet.fi mirrors for now, which might also go
away.

Please see to it that the port remains fetchable, for instance, by
finding another site that permanently hosts the files, or indicate how
to proceed should we require to remove this port.

Thank you.
